message:
Add UI module dependencies and comprehensive tests

Dependencies:
- colored: terminal color support
- is-terminal: TTY detection
- terminal_size: terminal dimensions
- regex: pattern matching for output formatting

Tests added:
- SelectionReason serialization/deserialization (types.rs)
- SelectionReason Display implementations (types.rs)
- TerminalCaps defaults and background detection (context.rs)
- Color level handling in plain mode (context.rs)
- Worker selection scenarios in daemon API (api.rs)

Also:
- Expose ui module publicly for integration tests
- Add Debug derive to SharedOutputBuffer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
